title: Iron Ashes — Agent Handover State
description: Single machine-readable source of truth for v2 engine status. The `lastVerified` block and `dirty` are written ONLY by scripts/verify.mjs; the narrative fields are written by the agent as part of Definition-of-Done. See docs/AGENT-PROTOCOL.md.

currentStage.description: Stage id; MUST equal the first unchecked box in ROADMAP §4 (e.g. '3c'). Agent-written.

currentStageTitle.description: Human title of the current stage. Agent-written.

specRefs.description: Spec anchors for this stage (e.g. 'ALGORITHM §4.2'). Agent-written.

lastVerified.description: WRITTEN ONLY BY scripts/verify.mjs. The trust anchor — agents must not edit.

commit.description: Informational: git HEAD short sha at verify time.

sourceHash.description: sha256 over sorted src/v2 + tests/v2 file contents. The freshness anchor; handoff-check recomputes and compares.

dirty.description: WRITTEN ONLY BY verify.mjs: true if git working tree was dirty at verify time.

openRisks.description: Short operational risk list. Agent-written; design risks live in ROADMAP §6.
